title: Database connection timeout
description: PostgreSQL read replica times out after 30s under sustained load.
resolution_summary: Increased max_connections to 500 and restarted replica. Added PgBouncer for connection pooling.

title: VPN not connecting for remote users
description: Employees cannot establish VPN connections from home networks after firewall update.
resolution_summary: Rolled back firewall rule change that blocked UDP 1194. Verified with 10 remote users.

title: Email delivery failing
description: SMTP server refuses new connections. Mail queue growing to 5000+ messages.
resolution_summary: Cleared disk space by archiving old logs (freed 80GB). Restarted Postfix. Queue drained in 20 min.

title: High CPU usage on web servers
description: All web server nodes at 95%+ CPU. Response times exceeded 5 seconds.
resolution_summary: Identified runaway cron job pulling full table scan every minute. Killed it. Added CPU monitoring alert.

title: Authentication service returning 500
description: Login endpoint returns HTTP 500 for all users after deploy v2.3.1.
resolution_summary: Rolled back to v2.3.0 via kubectl rollout undo. Root cause: missing env var in new deploy config.

title: SSL certificate expired
description: TLS certificate for api.example.com expired causing browser security warnings.
resolution_summary: Renewed via Let's Encrypt certbot. Reloaded nginx. Added 30-day expiry monitoring alert.

title: Disk usage at 95% on prod-db-01
description: Primary database server disk utilization at 95%. Risk of data loss if not addressed.
resolution_summary: Archived 60 days of WAL logs to S3 (freed 200GB). Scheduled weekly S3 sync job.

title: CI/CD pipeline failing on main branch
description: All CI runs on main failing with exit code 1 on the test step after merge of PR #892.
resolution_summary: Fixed flaky test asserting on millisecond timestamp precision. Added retry logic.

title: Load balancer health checks failing
description: ALB health checks reporting 503 for 3 of 5 app instances. Partial outage.
resolution_summary: Restarted app containers that had exhausted file descriptors. Increased ulimit in systemd service.

title: Redis cache evictions spiking
description: Redis eviction rate hit 10k/sec causing cache miss storm and DB overload.
resolution_summary: Increased Redis maxmemory from 4GB to 8GB. Changed eviction policy to allkeys-lru.

title: DNS resolution failing for internal services
description: Internal microservices cannot resolve each other's hostnames. Inter-service calls failing.
resolution_summary: DNS server OOM-killed. Restarted bind9 and increased memory limit. Flushed caches on all hosts.

title: Kubernetes pods stuck in CrashLoopBackOff
description: 5 pods in production namespace stuck in CrashLoopBackOff after config map change.
resolution_summary: Reverted ConfigMap change. Root cause: invalid YAML indentation in configmap update.

title: SFTP server unreachable
description: External partners cannot connect to SFTP server for file transfers. Connection refused on port 22.
resolution_summary: OpenSSH service crashed due to corrupted host key file. Regenerated keys and restarted.

title: Application logs not appearing in Elasticsearch
description: Log pipeline broken. Logstash not ingesting from Filebeat for past 2 hours.
resolution_summary: Elasticsearch disk watermark reached. Deleted old indices. Restarted Logstash pipeline.

title: Payment gateway timeouts
description: Payment processing timing out at checkout. Revenue impact. External gateway returning 504.
resolution_summary: Identified gateway provider incident. Implemented fallback to secondary payment provider within 30 min.
